definition: The DNABERT-2 ranking is compared against the handcrafted multimodal ranking at the same cutoff, either top-50 or top-100.
Genes ranked inside the DNABERT-2 top-N list but outside the handcrafted multimodal top-N list.
Genes ranked inside the handcrafted multimodal top-N list but outside the DNABERT-2 top-N list.
Genes ranked inside both DNABERT-2 and handcrafted multimodal top-N lists.

For each moved-in or moved-out set, same-size random gene sets were sampled from the 271-gene candidate universe 1,000 times, and observed curated theme counts were compared against the random distribution.
